title: AuditEntry
description: Immutable audit log entry. Written once by the domain service, never updated. DOMAIN INVARIANT: every work item state change must produce an AuditEntry (who, what, when, previous state, new state). Enforced in domain services — not in adapters. changedFields values are UNMASKED: the audit log is the authoritative unmasked record, access-controlled by audit query roles. Application logs (Loki) are masked. PostgreSQL index: (workItemId, timestamp).

workItemId.description: FK to WorkItem. Audit trail queried as: SELECT * FROM audit_entries WHERE work_item_id = ? ORDER BY timestamp.

correlationId.description: Same as the WorkItem's correlationId at time of event. Allows correlation of audit entries with distributed traces in Tempo.

eventType.description: ROUTING_FALLBACK distinguishes catch-all defaultGroup routing from a matched-rule routing. TRANSITION_FAILED written when an action with onFailure=ROLLBACK_TRANSITION fails and the item is returned to fromState.

previousState.description: Null on INGESTION event (no prior state). Required on all other events.

newState.description: The state after this event. On INGESTION this is the initialState.

transitionName.description: The named workflow transition that produced this event (e.g. close-as-resolved, forward-to-compliance). Set on STATE_TRANSITION events. Null for system-generated events (SLA_BREACH, INGESTION, etc.).

changedFields.description: Field-level changes recorded for this event. Values are UNMASKED. The audit log is the authoritative record of what changed and by how much.

fieldPath.description: Dot-notation path into WorkItem.fields (e.g. trade.notionalAmount.amount, counterparty.name).

previousValue.description: Value before the change. Type mirrors the field's declared type in field-type-registry. Null if the field did not exist before.

newValue.description: Value after the change. Type mirrors the field's declared type in field-type-registry.

actorUserId.description: userId of the human or service account that triggered this event.

actorRole.description: Role of the actor at the time of the event (as declared in user-role-config).

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp. The ordering dimension for the audit trail.

idempotencyKey.description: Same idempotency key as the triggering event. Allows deduplication of audit writes in the event of retry.
